form.formComment: Drawn the inside alley. Most recent effort finished 5th on April 9 over 520m at this track behind Star Turn beaten 15 lengths (30.47) in a Free For All. Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.

formComments.comment: Drawn the inside alley. Most recent effort finished 5th on April 9 over 520m at this track behind Star Turn beaten 15 lengths (30.47) in a Free For All. Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.

form.formComment: Racing well without winning, recording three minors on end, the latest hitting the ground running with a fast early sectional but finishing in the minors again when third (30.16) over 520m at this track. Thereabouts and rates well in this. Expected to run well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Racing well without winning, recording three minors on end, the latest hitting the ground running with a fast early sectional but finishing in the minors again when third (30.16) over 520m at this track. Thereabouts and rates well in this. Expected to run well.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 520m. Last start finished 5th over 520m at this track beaten 7 lengths (30.14) behind Strut in a Grade 5 on April 9. Leading contender.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 520m. Last start finished 5th over 520m at this track beaten 7 lengths (30.14) behind Strut in a Grade 5 on April 9. Leading contender.

form.formComment: Has finished sixth at the last two runs, both at Q Lakeside, the latest when beaten 7 lengths behind Comical Warren over 457m. Others preferred.

formComments.comment: Has finished sixth at the last two runs, both at Q Lakeside, the latest when beaten 7 lengths behind Comical Warren over 457m. Others preferred.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage third but before that won by 2.5 lengths at this track (29.70) beating Midnight Queen in a Grade 5 on April 2. In the minors two starts back. Winning chance on best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Got back last start and could only manage third but before that won by 2.5 lengths at this track (29.70) beating Midnight Queen in a Grade 5 on April 2. In the minors two starts back. Winning chance on best form.

form.formComment: Improved sharply when third behind Star Turn at this track last start over 520m (30.00). Made up good ground from the back and will be strong late again. Has to be included.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hampered entering the turn into the back straight and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Good performance after racing just off the speed to win by 3 lengths at this track over 520m (29.52) beating Neame in Grade 4/5 on April 9. Has a solid record from this draw, including four wins. Expected to go well.

form.formComment: Finished second last start (29.90) over 520m at this track. Jumps from a wide draw. Looks to have the job ahead.
